metaAudit.title: 360° Meta Audit
metaAudit.subtitle: Six views to diagnose Meta performance. Below is sample data until your ad account is connected.
metaAudit.filtersEmptyPreview: No rows match these filters yet. Apply to refresh the workspace view.
metaAudit.matrixEmpty: Illustrative placement only. Connect Meta to load real creative performance.
metaAudit.tabPlaceholder: This audit view is scaffolded for layout parity. Hook charts and tables to Meta sync when endpoints are ready.
metaAudit.introBody: Each tab answers one question about your Meta ads. Figures here are samples so you can learn the layout before connecting Meta.
metaAudit.introStep1: Choose a date range and KPI (top right).
metaAudit.introStep2: Switch tabs: dashboard, targeting, auction, geo, creatives, and ad copy.
metaAudit.introStep3: Use presets and filters, then save a view you open every week.
metaAudit.refreshed: Preview refreshed (demo). Connect Meta for live sync.
metaAudit.metaHelp: Account snapshot: spend, ROAS, and top campaigns (sample).
metaAudit.targetingHelp: Audience breadth vs. performance — spot overlap or fatigue risk (sample).
metaAudit.auctionHelp: Auction pressure and delivery — why costs move (sample).
metaAudit.geoHelp: Budget split by region — where results come from (sample).
metaAudit.creativeHelp: Formats and a simple performance map — pick winners for Ad Launcher (sample).
metaAudit.adcopyHelp: Headline and body patterns vs. metrics (sample).
metaAudit.copySelectHint: Select rows, then send them to Ad Launcher.
metaAudit.matrixBlurb: Strong results + controlled spend sit toward the top-right. Early tests sit bottom-left (illustrative).
metaAudit.matrixSampleCaption: Illustrative dots — connect Meta to plot your real creatives here.
metaAudit.subtitleLive: Six views to diagnose Meta performance. Numbers below come from your connected Meta accounts for the selected period.
metaAudit.introBodyLive: Each tab answers one question about your Meta ads. The dashboard tab uses live reporting data; other tabs stay illustrative until deeper breakdowns sync.
metaAudit.loadError: Could not load Meta reporting. Check that Meta Ads is connected for this workspace.
metaAudit.personaHintOwner: High-level risks, budget concentration, and clear next checks.
metaAudit.personaHintSpecialist: Delivery metrics (CTR, CPC), outliers vs. account average, and campaign-level fixes.
metaAudit.tipOwner: Prioritize spend concentration and any campaigns with spend but no clicks — those waste budget first.
metaAudit.tipSpecialist: Compare CTR and CPC to the account median; pause or retest outliers before scaling winners.
metaAudit.risksEmpty: No automatic risk flags for this window. Rules check spend concentration, CTR vs. blended average, CPC vs. median, and spend without clicks.
metaAudit.findingEmptyConnect: Connect a Meta ad account in workspace settings to run a live audit.
metaAudit.findingNoCampaigns: Meta is connected but no campaign rows were returned for this period — widen the date range or check account access.
metaAudit.riskSpendConcentration: Budget is concentrated: top campaign "{{name}}" takes {{share}}% of spend — diversification or consolidation should be a conscious choice.
metaAudit.riskLowCtrVsAvg: CTR on "{{name}}" is {{ctr}}%, well below the account blended {{avg}}% with meaningful volume — creative or audience fit is weak.
metaAudit.riskHighCpcVsMedian: CPC on "{{name}}" is {{cpc}} vs. median {{median}} among active clickers — review bids, placements, or audience overlap.
metaAudit.riskSpendNoClicks: "{{name}}" spent {{amount}} with zero clicks — fix creative, destination, or targeting before spending more.
metaAudit.actionReviewLowCtr: Open "{{name}}" in Ads Manager: test new primary text/creative and narrow placements if CTR stays low.
metaAudit.actionReviewHighCpc: Audit "{{name}}": check frequency, auction overlap, and whether this objective still matches the funnel stage.
metaAudit.actionRebalanceBudget: Reallocate part of the budget away from the single largest spender until efficiency (CTR/CPC) is validated.
metaAudit.actionFixNoClicks: Pause or cap delivery on "{{name}}" until click-through returns — otherwise you are paying for delivery tests only.
metaAudit.metaHelpLive: Account snapshot from synced reporting: spend, CTR, CPC, and campaigns in this date range.
metaAudit.targetingHelpLive: Illustrative layout. Audience overlap and fatigue still require breakdowns not yet in this reporting feed.
metaAudit.auctionHelpLive: Illustrative layout. Auction diagnostics need placement/auction breakdowns from Meta.
metaAudit.geoHelpLive: Illustrative layout. Geo split is not in the current campaign-level reporting payload.
metaAudit.creativeHelpLive: Illustrative layout. Use Reporting export or Ads Manager for creative-level IDs.
metaAudit.adcopyHelpLive: Illustrative layout. Copy-level metrics need ad-level breakdowns.
metaAudit.roasUnavailableNote: ROAS is not in this reporting sync yet — use Ads Manager or your pixel/catalog for purchase ROAS.
metaAudit.periodNote: Period-over-period (↑/↓) is not available until daily or comparison windows are exposed by the API.
metaAudit.targetingSampleNote: Illustrative data — connect Meta Ads for live audience diagnostics.
metaAudit.auctionSampleNote: Illustrative — real auction diagnostics need placement breakdowns from Meta.
metaAudit.geoSampleNote: Illustrative data — geo split requires region breakdowns from Meta.

automation.title: Automation

automation.filtersHint: Author and status filters will appear when tactics sync from the server.
automation.nextStepsBody: Connect Meta, open Auto-optimization to choose how aggressive automation should be, then create your first rule in the wizard.

automation.sampleTactic1: Pause campaigns when CPA exceeds target
automation.sampleTactic2: Scale top ad sets when ROAS is stable
automation.emptyDescription: Create tactics that start, pause, and scale budgets from live performance. Connect Meta and enable governed automation when you are ready.

preAuthOnboarding.welcomeBody: Before you create an account, tell us how you plan to use the platform so we can tailor your workspace.
preAuthOnboarding.welcomeBullet0: Link ad accounts and launch campaigns from one layer
preAuthOnboarding.welcomeBullet1: Use AI decisions and reporting to optimize spend
preAuthOnboarding.welcomeBullet2: Collaborate with your team under workspace governance
preAuthOnboarding.goalSubtitle: Pick the outcome that matters most right now — you can refine this later in the product.
preAuthOnboarding.budgetSubtitle: Helps us suggest sensible defaults for budgets and alerts.
preAuthOnboarding.industrySubtitle: We use this to surface relevant templates and benchmarks.
preAuthOnboarding.splitSubtitle: Describe where buyers actually show up (often several places in Uzbekistan), then set how you want spend spread across channels. Paid search/social sit next to marketplaces and Telegram.
preAuthOnboarding.splitTouchpointsHelp: One channel or several — e.g. Instagram DMs, OLX chats, Uzum orders, Telegram groups. Short notes are enough.
preAuthOnboarding.splitTouchpointsPh: e.g. Mostly OLX + Instagram Stories; some repeat buyers in Telegram…
preAuthOnboarding.splitInstagramAvatarsHelp: Who you sell to on Instagram — one persona or several (age, city, income, intent).
preAuthOnboarding.splitInstagramAvatarsPh: e.g. 24–35, Tashkent, buys gadgets on credit; SMB owners following Reels tips…
preAuthOnboarding.splitTelegramChannelsHelp: Public channels, private groups, your own bot — @handles or names.
preAuthOnboarding.splitTelegramChannelsPh: e.g. @yourbrand, local deals group name, support bot…
preAuthOnboarding.splitTelegramAudiencesHelp: Who you reach there: language, topic, geo, segment, lookalikes.
preAuthOnboarding.splitTelegramAudiencesPh: e.g. RU-speaking parents in Samarkand; car enthusiasts; wholesale buyers…
preAuthOnboarding.splitHint: Moving one slider rebalances the others so the mix always totals 100%. Detail fields are optional but help us tune Uzbekistan-first defaults. You can edit everything after sign-up.
preAuthOnboarding.geoSubtitle: We use this to bias geo targeting, reporting, and early learning toward the markets that matter most.

geoDesc.home: Most delivery and optimization signals stay in your main country first.
geoDesc.cis: Broader reach across neighboring countries with shared budget rails.
geoDesc.global: Worldwide audiences with conservative pacing until performance data stabilizes.

preAuthOnboarding.mediaSlotHint: See /public/onboarding/assets.json for export sizes and file names.

flow.title: From campaign launch to governed scale

connect.title: Connect workspace
connect.text: Ad accounts, team roles, billing contact, and access policy in one place.

launch.title: Launch and monitor
launch.text: Campaigns go live; AI decision logs and reporting update in near real time.

optimize.title: Optimize with controls
optimize.text: Auto-optimization workflows run behind approval rails.

scale.title: Scale with governance
scale.text: Keep discipline across many workspaces, accounts, and teammates.

pricing.title: Pricing aligned to real product logic
pricing.subtitle: Pricing is not just cards: plan limits on the server, Payme checkout, and marketplace commission flow work the same way in the product.

subscription.title: Layer 1 — Workspace subscription
subscription.text: Core platform value is monthly UZS subscription; plan limits are enforced on the server.

billing.title: Layer 2 — Billing operations
billing.text: Payments use Payme checkout plus order status polling. Invoices and methods are managed per workspace.

marketplace.title: Layer 3 — Marketplace commission
marketplace.text: Commission rates and specialist tiers are managed separately; rates can be configured per workspace.

security.title: Security and governance
security.intro: The workspace control layer gives clear responsibility and permission boundaries when working as a team.

revenue.title: Revenue-side visibility
revenue.intro: In the dashboard, spend, results, and payment status signals sit together for practical decisions.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about platform capabilities and monetization.
faq.q0: Is our pricing just a fixed package?
faq.a0: No — monetization is hybrid: platform subscription, billing operations, and marketplace commission layers.
faq.a1: Subscription orders open Payme checkout; order status is tracked in the platform.
faq.a2: Commission rates are set by specialist tier and period; bonus logic is supported separately.
faq.q3: Are the capabilities on this page real?
faq.a3: Yes — card links go to existing internal routes and working modules.

finalCta.title: Build your monetization-ready growth stack
finalCta.subtitle: Start with your workspace, connect billing, and run controlled AI-assisted campaigns at scale.

performance.subtitle: Monitor and analyze your campaign performance
performance.startTrackingDescription: Launch your first campaign to see real-time metrics here.
performance.name: Name

roiLearning.intro: This area is not a marketing calculator. It is the home for how AdSpectr turns your actual results into better models over time.
roiLearning.bullet1: We continuously ingest outcomes from connected accounts and your workspace activity (with your permissions).
roiLearning.bullet2: Signals such as spend, conversions, creative performance, and AI-assisted decisions improve recommendations for everyone—using privacy-safe aggregates.
roiLearning.bullet3: The more real volume we observe across industries and regions, the more trustworthy our ROI projections become.
roiLearning.bullet4: When our dataset crosses an internal quality threshold, we will enable the interactive ROI calculator here.
roiLearning.calculatorNote: Until then, use Dashboard and Reporting to steer budget; connect Meta so we can learn from live data.

creativeScorer.maxSizeError: File size must be less than 10MB
creativeScorer.fileTypeError: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or MP4 files are supported
creativeScorer.subtitle: Upload your ad creative and get AI scoring across 10 quality dimensions
creativeScorer.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click · JPG, PNG, WebP, MP4 · Max 10 MB
creativeScorer.emptyBody: Upload an image or video, pick a platform and format, set your goal — then run the scorer for a 10-dimension breakdown.
creativeScorer.loadingSub: Vision model checks dimensions and platform fit.
creativeScorer.demoBanner: Sample score shown — upload your creative on the left and run the scorer for a real evaluation.

competitorsPage.title: Competitor analysis
competitorsPage.subtitle: Add every competitor with their links, then run a portfolio review. When Meta app credentials are configured, we pull public ad samples from the Meta Marketing API (Ad Library / ads_archive) for each brand name, then our AI model synthesizes the JSON you see here—always cross-check with your own data.
competitorsPage.manusHint: Optional: a deeper Manus research pass can run on the server with the same payload.
competitorsPage.metaSourceHint: Meta Marketing API (Ad Library) + AI synthesis
competitorsPage.criticalBody: This is not casual benchmarking. It can shape positioning, creative direction, and budget. Treat every point as a hypothesis: validate with your own analytics, legal where relevant, and leadership before major commitments.
competitorsPage.ackRequired: Please confirm you understand the importance of this analysis.
competitorsPage.needOneFullRow: Add at least one competitor with a name and at least one link (social, site, or other).
competitorsPage.analysisFailed: Analysis failed. Try again or contact support.
competitorsPage.extraPh: TikTok, Meta Ad Library, YouTube, press — one per line or comma-separated
competitorsPage.ackText: I understand this output may inform strategy but is not guaranteed advice. I will cross-check with our data and stakeholders before acting on it.
competitorsPage.pressureHint: Higher means stronger pressure on your positioning and media efficiency.

budget.noStrategyDescription: Go to settings to generate your first AI strategy and budget plan.

aiDecisions.subtitle: Every AI action and recommendation with transparent reasoning
aiDecisions.demoNotice: Live API is unavailable — showing sample decisions so you can try the workflow. Connect your backend or Meta to load real data.
aiDecisions.pendingBannerBody: You are in assisted mode — the AI waits before executing changes.
aiDecisions.emptyAllDescription: The optimization loop runs every few hours. After your campaigns are analyzed, every decision appears here with full reasoning.
aiDecisions.emptyFilteredDescription: Nothing in this filter right now.
aiDecisions.helpTitle: Why does AdSpectr show this log?
aiDecisions.helpBody: Transparency is our core principle. Every optimization the AI makes is recorded here with its rationale, expected impact, and outcome. You should always know what is happening with your ad budget — and why.

aiAssistantPage.subtitle: Brainstorm campaigns, metrics, and workflows with AdSpectr AI. Messages are saved in this browser for this workspace.
aiAssistantPage.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to use the AI assistant.
aiAssistantPage.emptyHint: Ask about Meta campaigns, troubleshooting, automation, or how your team should run weekly reviews.
aiAssistantPage.starter1: How should we review weekly Meta performance as a team?
aiAssistantPage.starter2: Suggest a simple workflow: new product → first ads → scale.
aiAssistantPage.starter3: What metrics should I watch before increasing budget?
aiAssistantPage.placeholder: Describe a process, ask about metrics, or paste a campaign question…
aiAssistantPage.footerHint: Enter sends · Shift+Enter for a new line · AI can make mistakes; verify critical actions.
aiAssistantPage.sendError: Could not reach the assistant. Check your connection and try again.
aiAssistantPage.agentRoleTitle: Which agent are you setting up?
aiAssistantPage.agentRoleSub: Default is Targetologist. You can switch before starting the setup chat.
aiAssistantPage.agentRoleTargetDesc: Audiences, placements, geo, funnel — who to reach and where.
aiAssistantPage.agentRoleOptDesc: Bids, budgets, tests, scaling — how spend performs and when to adjust.
aiAssistantPage.freeChatHint: Or jump into free chat with the prompts below — the assistant uses the role you selected above.

wizard.waitConfirmPlaceholder: Use the buttons below to confirm or cancel.
wizard.confirmAsk: If this looks right, confirm below to enable assisted mode (AI suggests changes; you approve before major actions).
wizard.confirmBarBody: This turns on assisted autopilot for this workspace so AI can propose changes; you approve before major actions.
wizard.successBody: Assisted mode is on. Important changes will ask for your approval first.
wizard.cancelBody: Understood — nothing was changed. You can clear the chat to re-run setup or ask anything in free mode.
wizard.confirmError: Could not update workspace. Try again from settings.

targetologist.intro: Great — I’ll act as your Targetologist. Answer a few short questions so we can shape targeting and funnel before anything goes live.
targetologist.q1: What product or service should ads focus on (one or two sentences)?
targetologist.q2: Who is the ideal customer (age, city/region, interests, job role if B2B)?
targetologist.q3: Rough monthly ad budget you’re comfortable testing with?
targetologist.q4: Which channels do you want first (Meta, Google, both, other)?
targetologist.q5: Main conversion goal for the next 30 days (leads, purchases, traffic, app installs)?

optimizer.intro: Great — I’ll act as your Optimizer. Answer a few short questions so we can set guardrails and a testing cadence.
optimizer.q1: Which KPI matters most right now (ROAS, CPA, CTR, MER, other)?
optimizer.q2: How often can you review performance (daily, a few times per week, weekly)?
optimizer.q3: Any hard rules before scaling spend (min purchases, max CPA, min ROAS)?
optimizer.q4: Risk tolerance for creative tests (small experiments vs bolder swings)?
optimizer.q5: Anything we must avoid (regions, placements, topics, brand-safety)?

aiActorsPage.subtitle: Browse, filter, and manage your AI actor library.
aiActorsPage.heygenNotice: New actors are generated via HeyGen (Photo Avatar API). Set HEYGEN_API_KEY on the API server to enable live generation; without it, the form returns a configuration error.
aiActorsPage.creativeHubHint: Use the Social/UGC tab for ready-made talking-head layouts and hooks.
aiActorsPage.betaNotice: Actor image generation uses HeyGen on the backend.
aiActorsPage.presetCasualDesc: Friendly tone, living room or kitchen — good for consumer apps and D2C.
aiActorsPage.presetProDesc: Business attire, neutral background — B2B, SaaS, finance.
aiActorsPage.presetLifestyleDesc: Natural light, outdoor scenes — fashion, travel, wellness.

aiActorsModal.title: Create AI actor
aiActorsModal.name: Name
aiActorsModal.nameRequired: Enter a name for your actor.
aiActorsModal.genTimeout: Generation is taking longer than expected. Try again later.
aiActorsModal.genError: Could not generate actor. Check API key and try again.

creativeProjectsPage.subtitle: Group image, video, and UGC experiments per brand or campaign. Stored in this browser for the current workspace until cloud sync ships.
creativeProjectsPage.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to manage creative projects.
creativeProjectsPage.syncNotice: Projects are saved locally in your browser. Clearing site data or another device will not show them.
creativeProjectsPage.emptyHint: Create a project to track a creative line, seasonal push, or client folder — then build assets in Creative Hub.
creativeProjectsPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
creativeProjectsPage.adLibraryImportBanner: Imported from Ad Library. Copy and image draft are stored with the project — refine them in Creative Hub.

brandKitPage.subtitle: Capture colors, type preferences, and voice so AI tools and your team stay on-brand. Saved in this browser for the current workspace.
brandKitPage.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to edit the brand kit.
brandKitPage.syncNotice: Brand kit is stored locally in your browser until workspace-level sync is available.
brandKitPage.taglinePlaceholder: One line that sums up the brand promise.
brandKitPage.voicePlaceholder: How we sound: direct, warm, formal… Words we like or avoid.
brandKitPage.dosPlaceholder: One guideline per line: lead with outcomes, cite sources…
brandKitPage.dontsPlaceholder: One per line: no all caps, no unverified claims…
brandKitPage.resetConfirm: Reset all fields to default AdSpectr palette and empty text?

creativeProductsPage.subtitle: Keep SKUs, bundles, and copy notes next to your ads. Stored locally per workspace until catalog sync is live.
creativeProductsPage.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to manage products.
creativeProductsPage.syncNotice: Product rows are saved in this browser only.
creativeProductsPage.notesPlaceholder: Price band, offer, legal claims to avoid…
creativeProductsPage.emptyHint: Add what you promote so headlines and UGC scripts stay accurate.

creativeMediaPage.subtitle: Bookmark CDN links, drive files, and references. Generated files from Creative Hub live in the Library tab.
creativeMediaPage.noWorkspace: Select or create a workspace to use the media list.
creativeMediaPage.syncNotice: Links are stored locally in your browser.
creativeMediaPage.libraryHint: The Library tab lists creatives you save from Image, Video, and UGC tools.
creativeMediaPage.emptyHint: Paste a public URL to a file or folder you reuse in campaigns.

imageAdsPage.title: Image ads
imageAdsPage.subtitle: Choose how you want to start — each path uses the same Input → Configure flow.
imageAdsPage.methodProductDesc: Paste a URL to extract details and generate on-brand static ads.
imageAdsPage.methodUploadDesc: Upload a reference image and we’ll recreate the style for your brand.
imageAdsPage.methodCompetitorDesc: Find competitor ads and adapt winning layouts to your offer.
imageAdsPage.methodActorDesc: Pair your product with AI actors for UGC-style stills.
imageAdsPage.stylesHint: Filter inspiration templates (browse the full gallery from templates).
imageAdsPage.productPageSubtitle: Paste a product or landing page URL. We’ll extract everything and create ads.
imageAdsPage.shareProductBody: Paste a product URL to analyze, or pick from your existing products.
imageAdsPage.savedProductsHint: Pick a product you have already set up with images and selling points.
imageAdsPage.noProducts: No products yet. Import one from a URL above.
imageAdsPage.mockDescriptionBody: We prefilled a draft from your URL. Edit any field before generating.
imageAdsPage.uploadCloneSubtitle: Upload a reference image and we’ll recreate the style for your brand.
imageAdsPage.uploadInspirationBody: Upload ads, designs, or screenshots that inspire you. The AI will analyze the style, layout, and visual elements to generate fresh creatives for your brand.
imageAdsPage.configureCloneHint: Aspect ratio, variations, and brand kit will match the product-page flow in a future iteration.
imageAdsPage.competitorSubtitle: Clone competitor ads that are working and make them yours.
imageAdsPage.findCompetitorBody: Enter a Facebook Page URL or name and we’ll open their ads in a new tab.
imageAdsPage.browseAdLibrary: Or browse Meta Ad Library directly
imageAdsPage.pasteZone: Right-click an ad image in Meta Ad Library → Copy image → return here and press Ctrl+V. Or drag images from your browser, or drop image files.
imageAdsPage.pasteZoneLabel: Paste or drop competitor ad images
imageAdsPage.configureCompetitorHint: Hook, headline, and safe paraphrase controls will land here.
imageAdsPage.actorProductSubtitle: Combine your product with AI-generated models for UGC-style photos.
imageAdsPage.productImageHint: A clean product shot on a solid background works best.
imageAdsPage.clickUploadProduct: Click to upload a product image
imageAdsPage.aiActorsHint: Select one or more AI actors. Each actor will get their own set of variations.
imageAdsPage.actorsReady: I selected one or more actors in the gallery
imageAdsPage.configureActorHint: Pose, wardrobe, and shot list will be configured here.

creativeHubPage.heroSubtitle: Pick a format, generate with AI, then save to your library or ship to campaigns.
creativeHubPage.createLaunchSubtitle: Choose a style, generate creatives with AI, and launch when you are ready to test.
creativeHubPage.cardImageDesc: Scroll-stopping static creatives — paste a URL, upload inspiration, or start from a template.
creativeHubPage.cardVideoDesc: Product-led or avatar-style clips for feeds — storyboard, generate, and iterate.
creativeHubPage.cardTtiDesc: Describe the scene; AI renders ad-ready visuals for your brand palette.
creativeHubPage.socialSubtitle: Templates that feel native — tap one to open the full UGC studio.
creativeHubPage.libraryDesc: Review exports from image, video, and UGC flows in one place.

header.workspaceSubtitle: ad accounts, subscription, payments, team, MCP
header.aiDecisionsSubtitle: Every action the AI has taken — with full reasoning
header.competitorsSubtitle: Meta Marketing API (Ad Library) plus AI portfolio synthesis — validate with your own analytics
header.roiSubtitle: We learn from your real campaign outcomes first; the public ROI calculator will launch when we have enough benchmark data.
header.automationSubtitle: Rule wizard + auto-optimization; overview uses sample data until runs sync.
header.automationWizardSubtitle: Build rules with steps, conditions, and schedules
header.adLauncherSubtitle: Select ads, presets, and creative bundles
header.marketplaceSearchSubtitle: Search and filter marketing specialists for your business
header.marketplacePortfoliosSubtitle: Public specialist showcases on the marketplace
header.portfolioSubtitle: Four steps: connect accounts, profile, visibility, then publish to the marketplace.
header.aiAssistantSubtitle: Chat about campaigns, metrics, and marketing workflows
header.aiActorsSubtitle: Virtual presenters for UGC-style and social ads
header.brandKitSubtitle: Colors, type, and voice for on-brand creative
header.creativeProductsSubtitle: SKUs and notes for creative and copy
header.creativeMediaSubtitle: Bookmarks and path to your creative library
header.performanceSubtitle: Campaign table from Meta reporting for the selected period
header.creativeHubSubtitle: Image ads, actors, brand kit, and media in one place
header.retargetingSubtitle: Audiences and flows for bringing visitors back
header.signalBridgeSubtitle: Post-purchase Redis signals and repeat-buy after 7 days
header.wizardSubtitle: Guided setup for campaigns and workspace
header.reportBuilderSubtitle: Metric library, canvas, and saved layouts by persona
header.adLibrarySubtitle: Competitive ads intelligence for Uzbekistan — filters, scoring, and one-click Creative Hub handoff
header.audienceStorySubtitle: Persona narrative, journey funnel, interests, creative fit, and competitor timing — story-first

reports.builderSubtitle: Choose what to show first, then drag metrics onto the canvas; layout is saved per workspace.

audienceStory.pageSubtitle: Who you sell to — as a story, not only charts. MVP uses mock data; wire Meta Insights + Signal Bridge + clustering next.

adLibrary.subtitle: Competitor and trend signals (mock Uzbekistan data). Next: Meta Marketing API Ad Library (ads_archive) for UZ.
adLibrary.legalHint: Inspiration only — adapt for your brand; do not copy verbatim. Official Meta API access is policy-compliant; third-party scraping is separate governance.
adLibrary.importOk: Project created — open Creative Hub → Projects.

landingPageBuilder.title: AI landing page studio
landingPageBuilder.subtitle: Pick a template, add a short brief and optional product or business photos. We generate structured copy in Uzbek, tuned to your workspace — then you edit and publish.
landingPageBuilder.addonTitle: Not included in the base subscription
landingPageBuilder.addonBody: Landing generation is billed separately (usage or package). Your main plan covers campaigns, analytics, and workspace tools — check Payments for add-on pricing when it is enabled for your account.
landingPageBuilder.manusLine: For the deepest research-and-build pass, generation can be routed through Manus on the server when enabled — this screen already sends template, brief, and image context to the API.
landingPageBuilder.templatesHelp: Choose the structure that best matches how you sell. You can still edit everything after generation.
landingPageBuilder.tpl_local_body: Clinics, repairs, courses, salons — strong phone/WhatsApp CTAs, trust, and “near you” reassurance.
landingPageBuilder.tpl_product_body: E-commerce or catalog — benefit-led hero, clear features, delivery or offer hooks.
landingPageBuilder.tpl_saas_body: Calmer tone, problem–solution, proof and FAQ for skeptical buyers.
landingPageBuilder.tpl_promo_body: Time-bound campaigns — urgency, single dominant offer, bold CTA.
landingPageBuilder.briefPlaceholder: What you sell, key price or promo, cities, objections to address, tone (strict/friendly)…
landingPageBuilder.photosHint: Up to 4 images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF). Max 4 MB each. We describe visuals to align copy — we do not invent facts or legal claims from pixels alone.
landingPageBuilder.photoTooBig: Each file must be under 4 MB.
landingPageBuilder.photoType: Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
landingPageBuilder.check1: Uzbek-first copy aligned to your workspace
landingPageBuilder.check2: Meta Pixel + Google Analytics fields in the editor
landingPageBuilder.check3: Call & WhatsApp buttons from workspace contact
landingPageBuilder.check4: Mobile-friendly layout in our hosted template
landingPageBuilder.etaNote: Usually 20–60 seconds if images are attached (vision pass + copy).
landingPageBuilder.regenerateHint: Last template & brief are reused for “Regenerate” until you change them here again.
landingPageBuilder.selectTemplate: Select a template above to continue.

topAds.title: Top Ads
topAds.subtitle: Best performing ads ranked by spend and engagement
topAds.demoNotice: Showing demo data. Connect your Meta account to see real top ads.
topAds.emptyDesc: Try adjusting your search or connect a Meta ad account.
topAds.footerNote: Data sourced from connected Meta Ad accounts via the Meta Marketing API.
